nodes.name: Code review and quality workflow
nodes.summary: Agent workflow doc defining plan/success-criteria, better-option checks, surgical implementation, verification, and large-run optimization guardrails for code review and quality tasks.

nodes.name: Domain Docs
nodes.summary: Declares the repo as single-context and points agents to CONTEXT.md (glossary) and docs/adr/ (decisions), with fallback guidance when those are absent.

nodes.name: Issue Tracker
nodes.summary: Describes the local markdown-based issue tracker under .scratch/<feature>/ and the steps and template for creating new issues with triage frontmatter.

nodes.name: Skill-focused codebase review (2026-05-20, revised)
nodes.summary: Dated review of repo readiness against Supabase, AI gateway, Cloud SQL health, and Figma Code Connect skills, with confirmed findings, recommended fixes, and an implementation order.

nodes.name: Triage Labels
nodes.summary: Canonical category (bug, enhancement) and state (needs-triage, needs-info, ready-for-agent, ready-for-human, wontfix) labels used by triage workflows.
